_comment: Generated-style leaf registry (hand-authored prototype). jtbd_id + persona are CANONICAL Ritual taxonomy values from Ritual's source of truth, each verified against the live classifier. Validated by scripts/validate-leaves.mjs against canonical/jtbd-allowlist.json. Never hand-invent jtbd_id.

leaves.title: Frame the product opportunity
leaves.description: Clarify and frame a product opportunity before committing — the problem, who it's for, and why now.

leaves.title: Draft the PRD
leaves.description: Turn an agreed direction into a product requirements doc — grounded in the real constraints and decisions, not assumptions.

leaves.title: Define the MVP scope
leaves.description: Decide what's in and out of the MVP — the cut lines, trade-offs, and what 'good enough to ship' means here.

leaves.title: Prioritize use cases
leaves.description: Rank the use cases and decide what to focus on first — weighing impact, effort, and the constraints that aren't written down yet.

leaves.title: Customer pain-point brief
leaves.description: Articulate and frame the customer's problems and pain points as a concise problem brief — grounded in real evidence, not assumptions.
